title: Secrets of the Sisar Run

'''''Secrets of the Sisar Run''''' is a supplement to ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[West End Games]]. It was written by [[Craig Robert Carey]], [[Shane Hensley]], and [[Pablo Hidalgo]], and was first published [[July 14]], [[1997]].

The book is a campaign setting based on elements introduced in ''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''. The adventures are designed for [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] or trader characters, who become involved in the machinations of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal empire.

{{Book-stub}}
